resume.raw_text:
=== Cristal Davidson - Resume.pdf ===
          Cristal C. Davidson 

Newark, NJ | (973) 289-2752 | cristal,davidson88@gmail,com  

EDUCATION 

Franklin & Marshall College, Lancaster, PA.                                                               (Graduated 2025)  
History and American Studies Joint-Major & Africana Studies Minor 

  American History High School, Newark, NJ 
  Graduated Salutatorian                                                                                                   (Graduated 2021) 

RELEVANT  EXPERIENCE 

  Historic Preservation Trust of Lancaster County           (Lancaster, PA. September 2024 – May 2025)  
  Archives Intern 

●  Transfered surveys of historical properties in Lancaster County onto the PastPerfect software to 

improve accessibility.  

●  Cataloged physical archival materials to improve organization and cleanliness in the office. 
●  Developed social media content to promote the Trust’s initiatives.  

  Mi Gente Latina Club                                              (Lancaster, PA. September 2024 – December 2024) 
  Director of Social Engagement  

●  Coordinated with more than ten on-campus clubs and community organizations to execute social 

events. 

●  Served as the primary point of contact for club members and community partners.  

  Mi Gente Latina Club                                                             (Lancaster, PA. January 2024 – May 2024) 
  Senior Advisor  

●  Liaised with senior club members, alumni, and the executive board to improve communication and 

coordination within the club. 

●  Organized and executed events that improved senior engagement and club participation. 
●  Coordinated the purchasing and distribution of merchandise for 24 seniors in collaboration with 

alumni. 

  Franklin and Marshall College                                                              (Lancaster, PA. November 2023)        
  Department of History Student Search Committee 

●  Participated in the hiring process by asking questions and engaging with candidates to assess 

their fit for the department. 

●  Completed detailed evaluation sheets, providing structured feedback on candidates' teaching 

abilities, effectiveness, and presentation skills in a classroom setting.  

  SKILLS 

▪Communication  ▪Conflict Resolution ▪Team Collaboration ▪Organizational and Project Management
